mapper.insert: INSERT INTO platform_sku_binding ( platform, external_sku_id, coupon_id, sync_enabled, last_stock, last_sync_at, last_sync_status, last_error, create_time, update_time ) VALUES ( #{platform}, #{externalSkuId}, #{couponId}, #{syncEnabled}, #{lastStock}, #{lastSyncAt}, #{lastSyncStatus}, #{lastError}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP )
mapper.update: UPDATE platform_sku_binding SET coupon_id = #{couponId}, sync_enabled = #{syncEnabled}, update_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}

UPDATE platform_sku_binding SET last_stock = #{lastStock}, last_sync_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, last_sync_status = #{lastSyncStatus}, last_error = #{lastError}, update_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM platform_sku_binding WHERE platform = #{platform} AND external_sku_id = #{externalSkuId}
SELECT * FROM platform_sku_binding WHERE coupon_id = #{couponId} LIMIT 1
SELECT * FROM platform_sku_binding ORDER BY id DESC
SELECT * FROM platform_sku_binding WHERE sync_enabled = TRUE ORDER BY id
